text.value: The Implementation Guide Resource id should be de.medizininformatikinitiative.kerndatensatz.template
An HTML fragment from the set [ip-statements.xhtml, ip-statements.xhtml] is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide

An HTML fragment from the set [cross-version-analysis.xhtml, cross-version-analysis-inline.xhtml, cross-version-analysis.xhtml, cross-version-analysis-inline.xhtml] is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide

An HTML fragment from the set [dependency-table.xhtml, dependency-table-short.xhtml, dependency-table-nontech.xhtml, dependency-table.xhtml, dependency-table-short.xhtml, dependency-table-nontech.xhtml] is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
An HTML fragment from the set [globals-table.xhtml, globals-table.xhtml] is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide

There are no valid display names found for the code http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/artifact-version-policy-codes#package for language(s) 'de'. The display is 'Package' which is a valid display for the default language

Unknown Code 'C15607' in the CodeSystem 'http://ncicb.nci.nih.gov/xml/owl/EVS/Thesaurus.owl' version 'null' - note that the code system is labeled as a fragment, so the code may be valid in some other fragment
There are no valid display names found for the code urn:iso:std:iso:3166#DE for language(s) 'de'. The display is 'Germany' which is a valid display for the default language
Canonical URL 'http://fhir.org/packages/de.basisprofil.r4/ImplementationGuide/de.basisprofil.r4' kann nicht aufgelöst werden
The canonical URL http://fhir.org/packages/de.basisprofil.r4/ImplementationGuide/de.basisprofil.r4 doesn't point to an actual ImplementationGuide resource

The resource ImplementationGuide/mii-ig-template could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)
There are no valid display names found for the code urn:iso:std:iso:3166#DE for language(s) 'de'. The display is 'Germany' which is a valid display for the default language
The extension http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-maxValueSet|5.3.0 is deprecated with the note: 'Use additionalBinding extension or element instead'

The resource StructureDefinition/example-patient could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

Unused 'en' translation 'Minimales Beispielprofil, das nur mit der Vorlage ausgeliefert wird, damit ein neu erstelltes Modul sofort eine gerenderte IG erzeugt. Kein MII-Artefakt — ersetzen Sie es durch die Profile Ihres Moduls.' -> 'Minimal example profile shipped only with the template so that a newly created module immediately renders an IG. Not an MII artifact — replace it with your module's profiles.'
